revision.comment: add column scopes and optional caption parameter ([[WP:ACCESS]])
revision.text:
{| class="wikitable sortable" style="width:100%;" {{if||{{{caption|}}}|{{!}}+{{{caption}}}|}} !scope=col width="30%" style="text-align:left;" | Site !scope=col width="10%" style="text-align:left;" | Municipality !scope=col width="30%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| Comments !scope=col width="10%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| Image !scope=col width="10%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| Coordinates !scope=col width="5%" style="text-align:left;" | Type !scope=col width="5%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| Ref. |- <noinclude> {{NHS Japan row}} |} {{documentation}}
</noinclude>

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="width:100%;" {{if||{{{caption|}}}|{{!}}+{{{caption}}}|}} !scope=col width="30%" style="text-align:left;" | Site !scope=col width="10%" style="text-align:left;" | Municipality !scope=col width="30%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| Comments !scope=col width="10%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| Image !scope=col width="10%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| Coordinates !scope=col width="5%" style="text-align:left;" | Type !scope=col width="5%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| Ref. |- <noinclude> {{NHS Japan row}} |} {{documentation}}
</noinclude>

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="width:100%;" {{if||{{{caption|}}}|{{!}}+{{{caption}}}|}} !scope=col width="30%" style="text-align:left;" | Site !scope=col width="10%" style="text-align:left;" | Municipality !scope=col width="30%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| Comments !scope=col width="10%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| image !scope=col width="10%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| Coordinates !scope=col width="5%" style="text-align:left;" | Type !scope=col width="5%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| Ref. |- <noinclude> {{NHS Japan row}} |} {{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{| class="wikitable sortable" style="width:100%;" {{if||{{{caption|}}}|{{!}}+{{{caption}}}|}} !scope=col width="30%" style="text-align:left;" | Site !scope=col width="10%" style="text-align:left;" | Municipality !scope=col width="30%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| Comments !scope=col width="10%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| image !scope=col width="10%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| Coordinates !scope=col width="5%" style="text-align:left;" | Type !scope=col width="5%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| Ref. |- <noinclude> {{NHS Japan row}} |} {{documentation}}
</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{| class="wikitable sortable" style="width:100%;" {{if||{{{caption|}}}|{{!}}+{{{caption}}}|}} !scope=col width="30%" style="text-align:left;" | Site !scope=col width="10%" style="text-align:left;" | Municipality !scope=col width="30%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| Comments !scope=col width="10%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| image !scope=col width="10%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| Coordinates !scope=col width="5%" style="text-align:left;" | Type !scope=col width="5%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| Ref. |- <noinclude> {{NHS Japan row}} |} {{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{| class="wikitable sortable" style="width:100%;" {{if||{{{caption|}}}|{{!}}+{{{caption}}}|}} !scope=col width="30%" style="text-align:left;" | Site !scope=col width="10%" style="text-align:left;" | Municipality !scope=col width="30%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| Comments !scope=col width="10%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| image !scope=col width="10%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| Coordinates !scope=col width="5%" style="text-align:left;" | Type !scope=col width="5%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| Ref. |- <noinclude> {{NHS Japan row}} |} {{documentation}}
</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515730952|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{| class="wikitable sortable" style="width:100%;" {{if||{{{caption|}}}|{{!}}+{{{caption}}}|}} !scope=col width="30%" style="text-align:left;" | Site !scope=col width="10%" style="text-align:left;" | Municipality !scope=col width="30%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| Comments !scope=col width="10%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| image !scope=col width="10%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| Coordinates !scope=col width="5%" style="text-align:left;" | Type !scope=col width="5%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| Ref. |- <noinclude> {{NHS Japan row}} |} {{documentation}}
</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="width:100%;" {{if||{{{caption|}}}|{{!}}+{{{caption}}}|}} !scope=col width="30%" style="text-align:left;" | Site !scope=col width="10%" style="text-align:left;" | Municipality !scope=col width="30%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| Comments !scope=col width="10%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| image !scope=col width="10%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| Coordinates !scope=col width="5%" style="text-align:left;" | Type !scope=col width="5%" style="text-align:left;" class="unsortable"| Ref. |- <noinclude> {{NHS Japan row}} |} {{documentation}}
